# me.delqhi.com

Personal Angular 21 portfolio and blog.

## Read first
- `README.md` — project summary and run commands
- `AGENTS.md` — agent-facing usage notes
- `docs/README.md` — docs index

## Core code
- `src/app/app.ts` — app shell and navigation
- `src/app/blog.service.ts` — blog post data
- `src/app/blog-post/blog-post.component.ts` — article detail view
- `src/app/projects/projects.component.ts` — repositories view
- `src/app/readme/readme.component.ts` — README page

## Commands
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run build`
- `npm test -- --watch=false`
- `npm run dev`
